allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\AleFire\\Desktop\\Projects\\BSS_app\\images" -Recurse -Directory | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { "$\(Split-Path $_.FullName -Leaf\) - $\(Get-ChildItem -Path $_.FullName -File | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count\) files" } | head -20)

PowerShell($dirs = Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\AleFire\\Desktop\\Projects\\BSS_app\\images" -Recurse -Directory | Select-Object FullName; $dirs | ForEach-Object { $count = \(Get-ChildItem -Path $_.FullName -File | Measure-Object\).Count; "$\(Split-Path $_.FullName -Leaf\): $count files" } | Select-Object -First 25)
